MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Compel Production Of Electronically Stored Information Or, In The Alternative, For Sanctions Re Defendant Storagepro, Inc.S Spoliation Of Electronically Stored Information
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Randall A. Scarlett (415-352-6264; rascarlett@scarlettlawgroup.com)for Plaintiffs.
Julie Azevedo (Julie.Azevedo@lewisbrisbois.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs MARTIN STEVKO and OLGA STEVKO's Motion To Compel Production Of Electronically Stored Information Or, In The Alternative, For Sanctions Re Defendant Storagepro, Inc.S Spoliation Of Electronically Stored Information:

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's notion to compel production of electronically stored information or, in the alternative, for sanctions re Defendant StoragePRO, Inc.'s spoliation of electronically stored information is denied.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the adopted ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
